title: networkpolicy: Should be `NetworkEnabled` instead of `NetworkDefault` when explictly set
body:
NetworkPolicy should be set as NetworkEnabled when explicitly specified using
`--network` instead of silently marking it as NetworkDefault.

NetworkDefault is equivalent to NetworkEnabled but we can use
NetworkEnabled to verify if user explicitly used `--network` and prevent
override from builder configs.

Prevents builder override at: https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/run_linux.go#L1747

Closes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/3597

@TomSweeneyRedHat Its not a flake but looks like there is bug with `buildah-inside-container` networking which was missed and never caught.  `--network=none` is not being honored in case of `buildah-inside-container`

In first glance it seems the bug is unrelated to this PR and issue. But i need to verify that first. Will do that first thing tomorrow.
